info.description: Site-wide settings: titles, section icons, fonts and the editable copy used across the whole site.

siteName.description: Brand name shown in the header and the browser tab.

tagline.description: Short tagline used in the browser tab title and meta description.

brandImage.description: Optional logo image shown top-left instead of the brand icon.

homeTitle.description: The big headline on the homepage.

homeSubtitle.description: Optional line under the homepage headline.

homeCaption.description: The small caption under the homepage treemap.

filesDescription.description: Description shown on the 'all files' listing header.

filesImage.description: Optional image shown in the Files header instead of the icon.

thoughtsSubtitle.description: Intro paragraph of the Thoughts section.

thoughtsDefaultView.description: Which layout the Thoughts page opens in.

aboutTitle.description: Breadcrumb / label for the About section.

navFiles.description: Header nav label for the files listing.

navThoughts.description: Header nav label for the thoughts section.

navAbout.description: Header nav label for the about page.

footerText.description: Free text shown on the left of the footer.

headingFont.description: CSS font-family for headings. Use a system/web-safe font or one added under Custom fonts.

monoFont.description: CSS font-family for the monospace 'path' text.
